summary: Frontend-only test of PA wizard Capture step (Step 1). Verified: login as physician, upload showing full-fit (object-contain), controls (expand/replace/remove), preview dialog opens via slot click and expand icon, 'Enter manually' opens manual panel, validation error toast on missing required fields, manual submit creates request and shows Extracted data grid + Continue to dictation, and the auto-fallback on failed Extract Data reveals the manual-entry panel (backend returned 422 allow_manual as expected).

issues: A11y: DialogContent has no DialogTitle/Description — Radix logs a11y warnings in console. Wrap a VisuallyHidden DialogTitle inside capture-preview-dialog.

action_items: (Low) Add a VisuallyHidden <DialogTitle> and aria-describedby (or Description) inside the capture preview Dialog to satisfy Radix a11y requirements.
critical_code_review_comments: CaptureStep is well-scoped (<250 lines), uses data-testids consistently, and correctly branches on allow_manual for the fallback path.
Manual submit success path shows 'Details saved' toast but the extracted grid rendering relies on state.extractedData patch — working as intended.
Consider surfacing the specific error 'detail' from Claude/OCR in the toast (currently done via formatApiError) — worked in this run.
seed_data_creation: Uploaded /tmp/test_doc.jpg generated with PIL (600x800 JPEG containing 'TEST DOCUMENT' text).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Capture-step feature requirements verified end-to-end via Playwright. Manual entry path works entirely (no AI dependency). The failed AI Extract path returns 422 {allow_manual:true} and the UI reveals manual-entry-panel + shows toast 'You can enter the details manually below.' Do NOT rely on Anthropic key for extract — expected to fail; fallback UX is the contract. Minor Radix a11y warning in console (DialogTitle missing) — cosmetic only.
